news.headline: World Cup Daily: Sweden tops Group F after Netherlands-Japan draw
news.desc: Re-live all the action from Sunday's World Cup matches, with features, news, video analysis and color from around the competition.

news.headline: Côte d'Ivoire snatch late win against Ecuador
news.desc: Amad Diallo's pinpoint strike in the 90th minute gives Côte d'Ivoire an unlikely victory over Ecuador in Philadelphia.

news.headline: Uruguay lands in Miami after flight delayed by paperwork issue
news.desc: Uruguay arrived in South Florida on Sunday night ahead of its opening World Cup match after the team's plane was delayed for a couple of hours in Mexico due to what FIFA called "an airline permitting error".

news.headline: Egypt want to show who we really are at the World Cup - Hassan
news.desc: Egypt have won a record seven AFCONs but are still waiting for a win in the FIFA World Cup.

news.headline: Mehdi Taremi says Team Melli playing for 'every Iranian' at WC
news.desc: Iran coach Amir Ghalenoei and forward Mehdi Taremi said that they will be playing for all Iranians at the FIFA World Cup, as the prospect of protests looms ahead of their opening game against New Zealand.

news.headline: 2026 FIFA World Cup match schedule: Fixtures, results, features
news.desc: Check out all the fixtures, features and results for the 2026 FIFA World Cup in the United States, Mexico and Canada.
